description1.eng: We are very sorry this happened, please understand we are required to maintain a safe environment for all players and ensure that everyone can play the game in a pleasant environment. Thats why we have to mute when it is needed. please do read our chat rules from the link below for full information
description1.trans: Je nám veľmi ľúto, že sa to stalo, prosím, pochopte, že sme povinní udržiavať bezpečné prostredie pre všetkých hráčov a zabezpečiť, aby každý mohol hrať hru v príjemnom prostredí. Preto musíme stlmiť, keď je to potrebné. Prečítajte si naše pravidlá chatovania z odkazu nižšie, kde nájdete úplné informácie

description2.eng: If you believe it was a misunderstanding, please contact the moderator via our discord channel linked below.
description2.trans: Ak sa domnievate, že to bolo nedorozumenie, kontaktujte moderátora prostredníctvom nášho Discord Channel prepojeného nižšie.

description3.trans: Ak by ste chceli nahlásiť moderátora za zneužitie alebo priestupok, môžete osloviť Dexter (vývojár tejto aplikácie) prostredníctvom formulára odvolania nižšie

description4.eng: Alternatively, you may also contact the developer via email at ching.huang.dexter@gmail.com
description4.trans: Prípadne sa môžete tiež obrátiť na vývojára e -mailom na adrese ching.huang.dexter@gmail.com

Launch a collaborative attack in cyberspace targeting the Shangri-La Data Fortress.
If the attack succeeds, it's possible to force the Data Fortress to transmit exploits to all cybernetically connected users.

Launch a collaborated attack in cyberspace targeting the Shangri-La Data Fortress
        If attack is to succeed, it's possible to force the Data Fortress to transmit exploits to all cybernetically connected users

Reverse engineer tech scrap to improve your Print Rank.

Reverse engineer tech scrap to improve your Printing Rank.

Search around in ${zoneName} and scavenge for useful items.

description.eng: FurFlush Spray: The sleek canister reads 'Instant Clean, Instant Gone.' A quick spritz turns your grimy pet gleaming—no rinse, no mess, just poof! Perfect for those 'oops' moments before a cyber meet-up. Caution: May lead to unexpected pet swagger. Single-use magic for the urban explorer's companion. Disappears after use, leaving no evidence except a dazzling pet.
description.trans: FurFlush sprej: Elegantný kanister s nápisom „Okamžite čisté, okamžite preč.“ Rýchly sprej premení tvoje špinavé zvieratko na žiarivého - žiadne oplachovanie, žiadny neporiadok, len puf! Ideálne pre tie 'ups' momenty pred cyber stretnutím. Pozor: Môže spôsobiť neočakávaný štýl tvojho miláčika. Jednorazová magická pomoc pre spoločníka mestského objavovateľa. Po použití zmizne, nezanecháva žiadne stopy okrem ohromujúceho zvieratka.

description.eng: "ElectroFiber Bites™ contain a complex blend of fibers that conduct and store energy, boosting your pet's stamina and power for longer expeditions in the cyber wilderness."
description.trans: "Elektrovlákno Kúsky™ obsahujú zložitú zmes vlákien, ktoré vedú a ukladajú energiu, posilňujúc tak vytrvalosť a silu tvojho maznáčika pre dlhšie výpravy v kybernetickej divočine."

description.eng: When your pet's feeling under the weather, or just plain off, this is the go-to. It tackles everything from the sniffles to the 'I ate something weird' blues. Beware of side effects: may cause a sudden appreciation for your cooking and an increase in snuggle attacks. Because sometimes, the best remedy is a little laughter... and PawfectCure.
description.trans: Keď sa tvoje zvieratko cíti mizerne alebo sa mu jednoducho nedarí, toto je tá správna voľba. Zvládne všetko od nádchy po modroty z 'zjedol som niečo divné'. Pozor na vedľajšie účinky: môže spôsobiť náhle ocenenie tvojho varenia a nárast útokov na maznanie. Pretože niekedy je najlepším liekom trocha smiechu... a PawfectCure.

description.eng: A pass that can be used to adopt a pet from Neon Paw Sanctuary

description.eng: "Introducing the NanoNibble Ball – a marvel of playtime technology designed for sheer joy. Each ball lights up with mesmerizing patterns at the slightest touch, ensuring your pet is thoroughly entertained. After a session of unprecedented fun, the ball smartly deconstructs into harmless, eco-friendly particles, leaving no mess behind. Perfect for a single, unforgettable adventure in digital companionship, it’s the ultimate playtime experience that neatly disappears, sparing you the cleanup."
description.trans: "Predstavujeme NanoNibble loptičku - zázrak herného technologického dizajnu určený pre čistú radosť. Každá loptička sa rozžiari fascinujúcimi vzormi pri najmenšom dotyku, zabezpečujúc, že váš miláčik je dôkladne zabávaný. Po seansone bezprecedentnej zábavy sa loptička inteligentne rozloží na neškodné, ekologické častice, nezanechávajúc žiadny neporiadok. Ideálne pre jedinečnú dobrodružnú digitálnu spoločnosť, je to ultimátny zážitok z hrania, ktorý sa pekne vytratí, ušetrí vám upratovanie."

rateLimited.eng: Too many rename attempts. Please try again in ${minutes} minute(s)
rateLimited.trans: Príliš veľa pokusov o premenovanie. Skúste znova za ${minutes} minút

description.eng: sticky and sweet rice cake is a traditional Lunar New Year food and is believed to bring good luck and prosperity.\n recover ${percent}% shield upon consumption
description.trans: lepkavý a sladký ryžový koláč je tradičné lunárne novoročné jedlo a verí sa, že prináša šťastie a prosperitu

description.eng: A sticky rice dumpling made of glutinous rice and fillings, wrapped in bamboo leaves and eaten during the Dragon Boat Festival—consume it to receive a festive ${percent}% AFK EXP and ${percent2}% BTC boost
description.trans: Lepiivá ryžová knedľa z lepkavej ryže a plnky, zabalená v bambusových listoch a konzumovaná počas Festivalu dračích lodí – skonzumuj ju a získaš sviatočný ${percent}% bonus k AFK EXP a ${percent2}% bonus k BTC

descriptionv3.eng: A shard that contains advance exploits designed to increase random drop chance of high tier items. Gains additional drop chance of Legendary (${legendaryChance}%) and Epic (${epicChance}%) items when unlocking Legendary containers (Not stackable) for ${time} minute (Applies to all players). *IMPORTANT: The buff will only apply when the unlocking process is started while the buff is active*.
descriptionv3.trans: A shard that contains advance exploits designed to increase random drop chance of high tier items. Gains additional drop chance of Legendary (${legendaryChance}%) and Epic (${epicChance}%) items when unlocking Legendary containers (Not stackable) for ${time} minute. *IMPORTANT: The buff will only apply when the unlocking process is started while the buff is active*.

description.eng: A beautifully preserved rose bouquet. A traditional gift that extends the marriage bond by 30 days when given to your partner. A symbol of enduring love even in the digital age.
description.trans: Prírodne zachovaný kvetinový buket ruží. Tradičný dar, ktorý predlžuje sväz manželstva o 30 dní pri odovzdávaní partnerovi. Symbol trvalej lásky aj v digitálnom veku.

description.eng: A delicate cherry blossom petal infused with faint neon energy. Can be exchanged for items at the Shiba Shrine during the Sakura Festival
description.trans: Jemný list japonskej čerešne nasiadený jemnou neonovou energiou. Môže byť vymenená za predmety v Šibej svätyni počas Festivalu Sáky

description.eng: A holographic pass to CyberSanta's Workshop. Complete festive sorting challenges to earn rewards! 'Work hard, gift harder!' - CyberSanta
description.trans: Holografický preukaz do dielne CyberSanta. Dokončite sviatočné výzvy na triedenie a získajte odmeny! „Pracujte tvrdo, darujte tvrdšie!“ – CyberSanta

description.eng: A beautiful seashell that can be used to exchange items with Josie
description.trans: Krásna mušľa, ktorá sa dá použiť na výmenu predmetov

description.eng: This encrypted voucher automatically activates when initiating a time skip, exploiting system loopholes to apply a ${lowPercent}% discount or ${highPercent}% discount for time skip over 105 minutes. The grid silently processes the deduction before self-destructing the ticket; no manual activation required, no digital traces left behind.
description.trans: Táto šifrovaná poukážka sa automaticky aktivuje pri spustení oneskorenia času, využíva chyby v systéme na uplatnenie zľavy ${lowPercent}% alebo ${highPercent}% pri oneskorení času nad 105 minút. Sieť tichým spôsobom spracuje odpočet pred samozničením poukážky – manuálna aktivácia nie je potrebná, žiadne digitálne stopy po sebe nezanechá.

desc.eng: Advanced textile material with embedded circuitry.
desc.trans: Pokročilý textilný materiál s integrovanými obvody.

description.eng: A refreshing soda that can be used to increase EXP received in AFK tasks by ${percent}%.\nThis item can only be used during ${event} event
description.trans: Osviežujúci nápoj, ktorý môže zvýšiť získané EXP v AFK úlohách o ${percent}%. \nTento predmet môže byť použitý iba počas ${event} udalosti

notAvailableError.eng: This item is only available during Summer Event
notAvailableError.trans: Tento predmet je dostupný len počas letného podujatia

description.eng: Use SLANC Connector to connect SLANC to global chat for ${minute} minutes
description.trans: Použite Slanc Connector na pripojenie Slanc k globálnemu rozhovoru na ${minute} minút

description.eng: Made with love and care by Yen. delicious and nourishing meal that will grant the player -${percent}% damage taken for 20 minutes when eaten. Perfect for tackling tough challenges and conquering difficult foes, Yen's sushi is a must - have for any adventurer.
description.trans: Vyrobené z lásky a starostlivosti Yen. Vypracované a výživné jedlo, ktoré poskytne hráčovi -${percent}% poškodenie, ktoré sa pri konzumácii uplatňovalo 20 minút. Yen's Sushi je ideálny na riešenie ťažkých výziev a dobývaní ťažkých nepriateľov, je nevyhnutnosťou - mať pre každého dobrodruha.

description.eng: Can be used with the [Replication Console] in dungeons to receive random rewards.
description.trans: Môže byť použitý s [Replikačnou konzolou] v dungeonoch na získanie náhodných odmien.

desc.eng: High-grade synthetic material used in furniture construction.
desc.trans: Vysoce kvalitný syntetický materiál používaný pri výrobe nábytku.

description.eng:
Technology scrap from disassembled equipment, this can be reverse engineered to gain printing xp. 
        You can perform reverse engineering in the Job Hub.
description.trans:
Technology scrap from disassembled equipment. This can be reverse engineered to gain printing xp. 
        You can perform reverse engineering in the Job Hub.

description.eng: A Tech Scrap Cluster contains 1000 Tech Scraps, can be used to easily store and trade
description.trans: Klaster technikového šrotu obsahuje 1 000 technologických kúskov, ktoré sa dá použiť na ľahké uloženie a obchodovanie

description.eng:
When used, skip 60 minutes on AFK tasks.
        must be used at AFK screen
description.trans:
Pri použití preskočte 60 minút na úlohách AFK. 
         Musí sa použiť na obrazovke AFK

description.eng: A delicious roasted turkey, when consumed increases EXP received in AFK tasks by ${percent}%
description.trans: Lahodná pražená morka, keď sa konzumuje, zvýšenie EXP prijaté v úlohách AFK o ${percent}%

mailMessageInbox.eng: ${moderatorName} has undone the rename of your item ${itemName}, an ${chipName} has been sent to your item inbox.
mailMessageInbox.trans: ${moderatorName} has undone the rename of your item ${itemName}, 1 ${chipName} have been sent to your item inbox.

description.eng: A black market memory shard contains highly encrypted algorithm and schematic that is crucial in the process of upgrading equipments
description.trans: A black market memory shard contains highly encrypted algorithm and schematic that is crucial in the process of upgrading equipment.

description.eng: Contains fragments of advance AI designed to assist with upgrading equipments. When used, decreases the chance of destructive failure by ${percent}% (stackable) for ${duration} minutes
description.trans: Obsahuje fragmenty Advance AI navrhnuté tak, aby pomohlo s modernizáciou zariadení. Pri použití znižuje pravdepodobnosť deštruktívneho zlyhania o ${percent}% (stohovateľné) na ${duration} minúty

description.eng:
Contains fragments of advance AI designed to assist with upgrading equipments.
        When used, decreases the chance of destructive failure by 50% for 5 minutes. this only affect yourself.
        You can calibrate items in your Gang Headquarters, you must join or start a gang first.
description.trans:
Contains fragments of advance AI designed to assist with upgrading equipment.
        When used, decreases the chance of destructive failure by 50% for 5 minutes. This only affect yourself.
        You can calibrate items in your Gang Headquarter, you must join or start a gang first.

description.eng: Contains fragments of advance AI designed to assist with upgrading equipments. When used, decreases the chance of destructive failure by ${percent}% (stackable for ${maxStack} times) for ${duration} minutes.This effect will apply to all players online
description.trans: Obsahuje fragmenty Advance AI navrhnuté tak, aby pomohlo s modernizáciou zariadení. Pri použití zníži pravdepodobnosť deštruktívneho zlyhania o ${percent}% (stohovateľné pre ${maxStack} krát) za ${duration} minúty. Tento efekt sa bude vzťahovať na všetkých hráčov online

description.eng:
Experimental nano machines designed to reduces and negate the destructive effect when failing calibration, 
        when this is activated, all calibration fails will not destroy the item for 5 minutes (Applies to all players)
description.trans:
Experimental nano machines designed to reduce and negate the destructive effect when failing calibration, 
        when this is activated, all calibration fails will not destroy the item for 5 minutes

description.eng: A shard stores default settings and algorithm for equipments, this is used for factory-resetting your equipments
description.trans: A shard stores default settings and algorithm for equipment. This is used for factory-resetting your equipment

description.eng: A finely crafted ring recognized by the City Registry. Present this to propose a marriage bond. The license is time-limited under city policy and can be extended by both partners.
description.trans: Tento jemne vyhotovený prsteň je oficiálne uznaný mestským registračným úradom. Predložte ho ako návrh na manželskú zmluvu. Licencia je časovo obmedzená podľa mestskej politiky a môže byť predĺžená oboma partnermi.

description.eng: Caches with tier equal or lower than the selected tier selected.
description.trans: Cache s úrovňou rovnaké alebo nižšie ako vybraná vybraná vrstva.

description.eng: Equipments with tier equal or lower than the selected tier selected.
description.trans: Zariadenia s úrovňou rovnaké alebo nižšie ako vybraná vybraná úroveň.

description.eng: Set filters to select which items to sell to the shop.
description.trans: Nastavte filtre, aby ste vybrali, ktoré položky sa majú predať do obchodu.

notifySender.eng: ${recipient} has retrived your gift items (${itemNames}) from their inbox into their inventory.
notifySender.trans: ${recipient} prevezol(a) tvoje darčekové položky (${itemNames}) z poštovej schránky do inventára.

description.eng: You can contribute to the lore of items too by editing the config file in our GitHub page.
description.trans: K tradícii položiek môžete prispieť aj úpravou konfiguračného súboru na našej stránke GitHub.

description.eng: Track of all name changes for this item
description.trans: Záznam všetkých zmien názvu tejto položky

description.eng: Playing for visitors in your apartment
description.trans: Pre návštevníkov v tvojom byte

description.eng: Play this track everywhere you go
description.trans: Systémové prehrávanie vybranej skladby – vynútené

description.eng: No downloads, no installs. Play instantly on any device with a browser.
description.trans: Žiadne sťahovanie, žiadna inštalácia. Hraj okamžite na každom zariadení prostredníctvom prehliadača.

description.eng: No PvP. 50k+ Discord members. Wholesome vibes only.
description.trans: Bez PvP. 50 tisíc+ členov na Discorde. Len pozitívna atmosféra.

description.eng: Forge weapons, print gear, cook buffs. Turn raw loot into endgame builds.
description.trans: Vytvárajte zbrane, tlačte vybavenie a varte buffy. Preveďte surový loot do konečných buildov.

description.eng: Progress syncs across all devices. Start on PC, continue on mobile.
description.trans: Postup sa synchronizuje naprieč všetkými zariadeniami. Začnite na PC a pokračujte na mobilnom.

description.eng: Player-driven marketplace. Trade, sell, and build your fortune.
description.trans: Trh riadený hráčmi. Obchodujte, predávajte a budujte svoje bohatstvo.

description.eng: Regular limited-time events with exclusive rewards and unique gameplay.
description.trans: Pravidelné časovo obmedzené udalosti s exkluzívnymi odmenami a unikátnym herným zážitkom.

description.eng: Team up, climb leaderboards, unlock perks. Stronger together.
description.trans: Spojte sa, vystupujte na lídrovské tabuľky a odblokujte výhody. Silnejší spoločne.

description.eng: When someone donates, the ENTIRE server gets the buff. Community-powered progression.
description.trans: Keď niekto daruje, celý server dostane posilnenie. Pokrok pod podporou komunity.

description.eng: Own apartments from slums to penthouses. Decorate and customize your space.
description.trans: Maj svoje byty od špinavých čtvrtí po penthouse. Dekoruj a uprav svoj priestor.

description.eng: AFK farming when busy, engage in mini-games when active. Play your way.
description.trans: AFK farmovanie, keď ste zaneprázdnení; v aktivnom stave sa zapojte do minigier. Hraj po svojom.

description.eng: Unlock loot the fun way. Quick puzzles, hacking sims, and more—never just click and wait.
description.trans: Získavaj odmeny zábavným spôsobom. Rýchle hádanky, hackovacie simulátory a ďalšie — nikdy len klikni a čakaj.

description.eng: Zero advertisements. Enjoy uninterrupted gameplay, completely free.
description.trans: Bez reklam. Vychutnajte si plynulý herný zážitok úplne zadarmo.

description.eng: All purchases are cosmetic only. No stat boosts, no advantages. Everyone plays on equal footing.
description.trans: Všetko, čo si kúpite, je iba kozmetika. Nezískate žiadny boost štatistík ani výhody. Hráči sú na rovnakom poli.

description.eng: Adopt virtual pets. Feed, care for, and watch them grow. Tamagotchi vibes.
description.trans: Adoptujte virtuálne domáce zvieratá. Kŕmite, starajte sa o ne a sledujte ich rast. Vibe z Tamagotchia.

title.eng: The MMORPG That Respects Your Time

description.eng: A cyberpunk MMORPG with zero pay-to-win. Play free in your browser.
description.trans: Cyberpunk MMORPG bez Pay-to-Win. Zahraj si zadarmo priamo vo svojom prehliadači.

description.eng: Craft weapons, armor, and mods. Use caches from dungeons.
description.trans: Vytvárajte zbrane, brnenie a modifikácie. Využívajte zásoby zo jaskýň.

description.eng: Solo or co-op. Procedurally generated dungeons with rare loot drops.
description.trans: Solo alebo kooperácia. Procedurálne generované lochy s vzácnym lootom.

description.eng: Multiple tiers, random modifiers, upgrade slots. Chase the perfect roll.
description.trans: Viaceré úrovne, náhodné modifikátory a sloty na vylepšenia. Dosiahni dokonalý rool.

description.eng: 6 skill trees to master. Level combat, crafting, mining, and more.
description.trans: 6 stromov zručností na zvládnutie. Rozvíjaj boj, výrobu, ťažbu a viac.

description.eng: Join gangs, chat globally, trade on the market. Make friends.
description.trans: Zapojte sa do gangov, chatujte po celom svete, obchodujte na trhu. Získajte priateľov.

description.eng: Calibrate gear for stat boosts. High risk, high reward.
description.trans: Kalibrujte vybavenie pre zvýšenie statov. Vysoké riziko, vysoká odmena.

desc.eng: Not all battles are fought with weapons. Unwind on pristine shores, master the art of crafting, or just watch the sunset.
desc.trans: Ne všetky bitky sú vedené zbraňou. Oddýchnite si na čistých plážach, zdokonaľte svoje remeselné schopnosti alebo sa len pozerajte na západ slnka.

desc.eng: Where legends are forged. The neon-lit heart of civilization where runners gather, deals are struck, and your next adventure begins.
desc.trans: Kde sa tvoria legendy. Neónovo osvetlené srdce civilizácie, kde sa stretávajú runneri, uzatvárajú sa obchody a začína tvoja ďalšia výprava.

desc.eng: Fortune favors the bold. Hunt for rare gear, flip your loot, or score the deal of a lifetime in the sprawling player bazaar.
desc.trans: Šťastie láskavo obdaruje odvážnych. Lovte vzácne vybavenie, preprodávajte svoje nákupy alebo získajte deal roka v rozlehlom hráčskom bazári.

desc.eng: Your gateway to the unknown. Board the hyperloop and venture into procedurally-generated dungeons filled with danger and epic loot.
desc.trans: Váš vchod do neznáma. Posadnite sa v hyperloopu a vyrazte do procedurálne generovaných dungeónov plných nebezpečenstva a epických odmien.

description.eng: Leaderboard listing updates every ${minutes} minutes
description.trans: Aktualizácie zoznamu leadičiek každé ${minutes} minút

noPlayers.eng: Currently No Players in this Leaderboard
noPlayers.trans: Momentálne v tejto referenčnej doske žiadni hráči

contributionDesc.eng: These boards shows respect and credits to the legends who have contributed to the community.❤️
contributionDesc.trans: Tieto rady ukazujú rešpekt a kredity legendám, ktoré prispeli do komunity .❤

gameplayDesc.eng: These leaderboards shows player's gameplay statistics.💪
gameplayDesc.trans: Tieto výsledkové tabuľky ukazujú štatistiku hry hráča.💪

description.eng: Are you sure you want to delete loadout "${name}"?
description.trans: Ste si istý, že chcete vymazať náboj "${name}"?

empty.eng: You don't have any saved loadouts yet.

maxReached.eng: You've reached the maximum number of loadouts (${max})

nameTooLong.eng: Loadout name must be less than 20 characters
nameTooLong.trans: Meno zostavy musí byť kratšie ako 20 znakov

levelUp.eng: Your max loadout slots increase as you level up
levelUp.trans: Max slotov na výbavu sa ti zvýši, keď postúpiš na vyššiu úroveň

cantEnterError.eng: You need to be at least level ${level} to rent an apartment
cantEnterError.trans: Na prenájom bytov potrebuješ mať aspoň úroveň ${level}

descriptionv2.eng: Your cozy apartment in the city. your pets are waiting for you to come home.
descriptionv2.trans: Tvoje útulné bydlisko v meste. Tvoji mazlíci sa tešia, že sa vrátite domov.

name.trans: Vráť sa do centra mesta Shangri-La

descriptionv2.eng: The beautiful coast a few kilometers away of downtown. The perfect place to relax and enjoy the sea breeze.
descriptionv2.trans: Krásne pobrežie len niekoľko kilometrov od centra mesta. Ideálne miesto na oddych a vychutnanie si morského vánku.

name.trans: Vráťte sa do centra mesta Shangri-La

cantEnterError.eng: You need to join a gang to enter this area
cantEnterError.trans: Ak chcete vstúpiť do tejto oblasti, musíte sa pripojiť k gangu

descriptionv2.eng: The headquarters for you and your gang members to plan and execute your next operation
descriptionv2.trans: Hlavné sídlo pre vás a členov vášho gangu na plánovanie a realizáciu ďalšej operácie

descriptionv2.eng: Here are many shops and businesses reside. The perfect location to hone and refine your skills.
descriptionv2.trans: V tomto meste nájdete mnoho obchodov a firiem. Perfektné miesto, kde môžete zdokonaľovať svoje zručnosti.

descriptionv2.eng: One of the busiest cities in the continent. Here you can find all sorts of people from around the globe.
descriptionv2.trans: Jedno z najrušnejších miest na kontinentu. Tu nájdete všetky druhy ľudí z celého sveta.

tut.eng: You can complete AFK jobs to increase your skills here
tut.trans: Môžete dokončiť pracovné miesta AFK, aby ste zvýšili svoje zručnosti tu

tut.eng: You can sell or buy items from other players here
tut.trans: Tu môžete predať alebo kúpiť predmety od iných hráčov

description.eng: Go to Hyper Train Central Station
description.trans: Choďte na centrálnu stanicu Hyper Train

tut.eng: Start your adventure for epic loot here
tut.trans: Začnite svoje dobrodružstvo pre Epic Loot tu

descriptionv2.eng: The famous market street in Shangri-La. Loads of market stalls fill the street.
descriptionv2.trans: Slávna trhová ulica v Shangrile. Na nej sa nachádza hromada trhových stánkov.

description.eng: Level ${segment} to ${segmentMaxLevel}
description.trans: Úroveň ${segment} na ${segmentMaxLevel}

description.eng:
Gather all 3 different Key Fragments from Dungeons in each 3 zones in previous station, 
                    then go to [Terminal] at City Center [Hub] to brute-force (Craft) the key required to unlock this area
description.trans:
Gather all 3 unique Key Fragments from Dungeons in the previous station, 
                    then go to [Terminal] at City Center [Hub] to brute-force (Craft) the key required to unlock this area

description.eng: Go to ${zoneName}
description.trans: Choď na ${zoneName}

tut.eng: Click here to enter 1 to 4 level zone area
tut.trans: Kliknite sem pre vstup do zóny úrovne 1 až 4
Start with the level 1 to 10 area

descriptionv2.eng: Using the hyperloop, you can travel at supersonic speed across the continent with ease.
descriptionv2.trans: S hyperloopom sa môžete pohybovať po celom kontinentu s nadzvukovou rýchlosťou bez námahy.

description.eng: Return to ${mainHubName}
description.trans: Vráťte sa na ${mainHubName}

description.eng: return to ${segmentStationName}
description.trans: Vráťte sa na ${segmentStationName}

description.eng: Return to Hyper Train Station
description.trans: Vráťte sa na Hyper Train Station

desc-v2.trans: Sviatkové odmeny a exkluzívne sezónne predmety!

desc.eng: Celebrate the Year of the horse with festive rewards and special events!
desc.trans: Oslávte Rok koní s sviatkovými odmenami a špeciálnymi udalosťami!

cannotSendImageToNonFriend.eng: You can only send images to players who has added you to their friend list
cannotSendImageToNonFriend.trans: Obrázky môžeš posielať len tým hráčom, ktorí ťa majú v priateľoch

imageSendLimit.eng: You can only send ${limit} images every ${hours} hours
imageSendLimit.trans: Môžete poslať len ${limit} obrázky za každých ${hours} hodín

mailToBuyer.eng: You have purchased ${amount} ${item} from market for ${price}
mailToBuyer.trans: Kúpili ste si ${amount} ${item} na trhu za ${price}

mailToSeller2.eng: ${buyer} have purchased ${amount} ${item} from your stall, you have earned ${price} btc
mailToSeller2.trans: ${buyer} práve zakúpil/a ${amount} ${item} z tvojho stánku. Na tvoj účet pribudlo ${price} btc

upgradeSlotDesc.eng: You can increase your market slot to ${slot} by paying ${price} BitCoins
upgradeSlotDesc.trans: Slot na trhu môžete zvýšiť na ${slot} zaplatením ${price} bitcoinov

acceptedProposer1.eng: ${player} accepted your proposal! You are now married!
acceptedProposer1.trans: ${player} prijal vašu ponuku! Teraz ste manželia!

blocked.eng: You cannot propose to this player

cooldown.eng: You must wait ${minutes} more minutes before sending another proposal
cooldown.trans: Počkajte ešte ${minutes} minút pred ďalšou pokusom o vyznanie

deleteWhileMarried.eng: You can't delete your account while married. Please divorce first.
deleteWhileMarried.trans: Nie je možné vymazať účet počas manželstva. Prosím, najskôr sa rozvedzte.

noBouquet.eng: You need an ${itemName} to extend your marriage bond.
noBouquet.trans: Na predĺženie vašej manželskej väzby potrebujete ${itemName}.

noRing.eng: You need an Eternal Bond Ring to propose
noRing.trans: Pre návrh na svadbu potrebuješ Prsteň večného spojenia

partnerNotFound.eng: Your partner could not be found

ringMissing.eng: The proposer no longer has the ring
ringMissing.trans: Návrhujúci už nemá k dispozícii prsteň

success.eng: You've gifted a rose bouquet to ${partner}! Your marriage bond has been extended for another 30 days.
success.trans: Darovali ste ${partner} buket ruží! Váš manželský vzťah sa predĺžil o ďalších 30 dní.

proposalSent.eng: Your marriage proposal has been sent!
proposalSent.trans: Tvoja žiadosť o svadbu bola odoslaná!

proposalSentMail.eng: You have proposed to ${targetName} with an Eternal Bond Ring
proposalSentMail.trans: Pošiel si návrh na svadbu do ${targetName} s večným prsteňom spojenia

description.eng: Are you sure you want to propose to ${targetPlayer.getName()}? This will use your Eternal Bond Ring.
description.trans: Ste si istý, že chcete navrhnúť svadbu s ${targetPlayer.getName()}? Toto použije váš Vekohodný Pokojový Prsteň.

extendWithBouquet.eng: Gift a Rose Bouquet to extend for ${days} days
extendWithBouquet.trans: Darujte kyticu ruží na predĺženie o ${days} dní

imageHint1.eng: Click to upload a background image
imageHint1.trans: Click to upload a background image

invalidSymbol.trans: Zvolený symbol manželského vzťahu je neplatný

symbolHint.eng: Choose the emoji shown between your names
symbolHint.trans: Vyberte emotikon zobrazený medzi vašimi menami

vowNotAllowed.eng: Your vow contains not allowed words

vowTooLong.eng: Vow phrase must be 64 words or less
vowTooLong.trans: Výrok slubu musí mať 64 slov alebo menej

systemAnnouncement.eng: 💍 ${player1} and ${player2} have tied the knot! Congratulations to the happy couple! 🎉
systemAnnouncement.trans: 💍 ${player1} a ${player2} sa zaviazali! Gratulujeme šťastnému páru! 🎉

changeNotification.eng: ${player} has updated their marriage vow to ${vow}

cooldown.eng: You can update your vow again in ${minutes} minutes
cooldown.trans: Prísľub môžete opäť aktualizovať za ${minutes} minút

failed.eng: Failed to extend marriage. Please try again.

success.eng: You've gifted a rose bouquet! Your bond has been extended.
success.trans: Darovali ste kvetinový buket! Váš vzťah sa predĺžil.

error.eng: Failed to end marriage. Please try again.

saveError.eng: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

uploadError.eng: Failed to upload image. Please try again.

vowTooLong.trans: Fráza slibu musí mať maximálne 64 slov. Momentálne: ${count} slov

instructions.eng: Quick! Bypass the neural security nodes in sequence to gain system access. Follow the node sequence before the ICE protocol detects you.
instructions.trans: Rýchlo! Obíďte neurónové bezpečnostné uzly v poradí, aby ste získali prístup k systému. Sledujte sekvenciu uzlov skôr, než vás protokol ICE odhalí.

subtitle.trans: Zistené narušenie bezpečnosti: Firewall bol ohrozený

instructions.eng: Tap tiles to rotate. Connect source to target.
instructions.trans: Klepni na dlaždice a otáčaj ich. Spoj zdroj s cieľom.

instructions.eng: INTERCEPT VALID DATA PACKETS [GLOWING] // AVOID CORRUPTED ONES
instructions.trans: ZACHYŤTE PLATNÉ DÁTOVÉ BALÍKY [ŽIARIVÉ] // VYHNITE SA SKORUMPOVANÝM

desc.eng: Connection Terminated
desc.trans: Spojenie ukončené

col.eng: Select a code from the highlighted COLUMN

row.eng: Select a code from the highlighted ROW

desc.eng: Access Granted
desc.trans: Prístup povolený

detail.eng: Paths cannot cross - avoid broken nodes
detail.trans: Cesty nesmú prekrývať – vyhýbaj sa poškozeným uzlom

instructions.eng: Connect all signals - paths cannot cross
instructions.trans: Spojte všetky signály - cesty nesmú krížiť

smartHint.eng: Paths cannot share nodes - route around obstacles
smartHint.trans: Cesty nesmú zdieľať uzly – vyhýbajte sa prekážkam

description.eng: All routes established
description.trans: Všetky trasy sú nastavené

instructions.eng: ALERT: Security pattern detected. Memorize and replicate the binary sequence to gain system access. Blue represents 0, Red represents 1. Pattern visible for ${duration} seconds. Click anywhere to start immediately.
instructions.trans: UPOZORNENIE: Detekovaný bezpečnostný vzor. Zapamätajte si a zopakujte binárnu sekvenciu pre získanie prístupu do systému. Modrá predstavuje 0, červená predstavuje 1. Vzor je viditeľný po dobu ${duration} sekúnd. Kliknite kdekoľvek, aby ste okamžite začali.

success.eng: ACCESS GRANTED: Memory bank successfully breached. System compromised.
success.trans: PRÍSTUP UDĽENÝ: Pamäťová banka bola úspešne prelomená. Systém bol narušený.

instructions.eng: ALIGN_ENCRYPTION_KEYS [${total}] :: WARNING: SYSTEM RESET ON MISMATCH
instructions.trans: ALIGN_ENCRYPTION_KEYS [${total}] :: UPOZORNENIE: SYSTÉMOVÝ RESET PRI NESÚLADU

tip.eng: Click on the highlighted button to unlock
tip.trans: Kliknite na zvýraznené tlačidlo na odomknutie

description.eng: The transmission encrypted itself. Try again.
description.trans: Prenos sa zašifroval. Skús to znovu.

instructions.eng: You've detected an encrypted transmission. Intercept it by tapping when each frequency needle hits its target zone. All bands must be aligned before the signal disappears.
instructions.trans: Vy ste zistili šifrovaný prenos. Zastavte ho stlačením, keď každy fréqvenčný izik dotkne svoj cieľový zónu. Všetky pásma musia byť zarovnané predtým, ako signál zmizne.

description.eng: Decrypting transmission data...
description.trans: Dešifrovávam prenósové dáta...

hasSpace.eng: Name cannot contain spaces, you may replace the space with "_"
hasSpace.trans: Názov nemôže obsahovať medzery, môžete nahradiť priestor „_“

invalidChar.eng: Name can only contain English letters, numbers and "_"
invalidChar.trans: Názov môže obsahovať iba anglické písmená, čísla a „_“

tooLong.eng: Name must be less or equal to 16 characters long
tooLong.trans: Name must be less than 16 characters long

tooShort.eng: Name must be at least 4 characters long
tooShort.trans: Meno musí byť najmenej 4 znaky dlhé

description.eng: Download the app to get the optimal experience!
description.trans: Stiahnite si aplikáciu pre optimálny zážitok!

insufficientUnitsForRename.eng: You need ${required} Units to rename this item. You currently have ${current} Units.
insufficientUnitsForRename.trans: Potrebujete ${required} jednotiek na premenovanie tohto predmetu. Momentálne máte ${current} jednotiek.

empty.eng: No forced blocks on this player

autoLiftText.eng: This restriction lifts automatically once both accounts stop sharing the same network for a while.
autoLiftText.trans: Toto obmedzenie sa automaticky zruší, keď prestanú oboje účty používať rovnakú sieť na chvíľu.

explanation.eng: You and the recipient appear to share a device or network. To prevent multi-account abuse, interactions between linked accounts are restricted.
explanation.trans: Zdá sa, že vy a príjemca zdieľajú zariadenie alebo sieť. Na zabránenie zneužívaniu viacerých účtov sú interakcie medzi spojenými účtami obmedzené.

siblingsText.eng: Sharing a network with a real player (siblings, roommates)? You can send items via a trusted third-party.
siblingsText.trans: Zdieľate sieť s reálnym hráčom (súrodenci, spolubydlúci)? Môžete položky poslať prostredníctvom dôveryhodnej tretej strany.

warningText.eng: Accounts abusing multi-accounting may be suspended.
warningText.trans: Účty zneužívajúce viacnásobné účty môžu byť pozastavené.

title.eng: Are you sure you want to block this player?
title.trans: Ste si istí, že chcete zablokovať tohto hráča?

openBotProfileMessage.trans: Prístup zamietnutý. detekovaný profil, ktorý nie je humánny.

title.eng: I understand and I will never spam or break any of the chat rules
title.trans: Rozumiem a už nikdy nebudem spamovať a porušovať žiadne z pravidiel chatu

footer.eng: You will be MUTED if you breach any of the rules
footer.trans: Budete tlmení, ak porušíte niektoré z pravidiel

title.eng: Please agree to the rules below before start chatting
title.trans: Prosim súhlaste z pravidlami, skôr ako začneťe chatovať

tutorialLink1.eng: Full list of rules can be found in:

description.eng: You can contribute to content like this and many more too by editing the config files in our GitHub page.
description.trans: Môžete prispieť k obsahu, ako je tento a mnoho ďalších úpravou konfiguračných súborov na našej stránke GitHub.

description.eng: Use unofficial translation
description.trans: Použite neoficiálny preklad

description.eng: You can change language anytime at the settings page
description.trans: Na stránke Nastavenia môžete kedykoľvek zmeniť jazyk

description1.eng: As this game is made by only one person, it's very difficult translate all languages correctly, but I am working on adding more translations :)
description1.trans: Keďže táto hra vyrába iba jedna osoba, je veľmi ťažké preložiť všetky jazyky správne, ale pracujem na pridávaní ďalších prekladov :)

description.eng: This action cannot be undone. Both you and your partner will lose all marriage benefits.
description.trans: Táto akcia sa nedá odvolať. Vy a váš partner stratíte všetky benefity z manželstva.

title.eng: Are you sure you want to end the marriage?
title.trans: Ste si istý/istá, že chcete ukončiť manželstvo?

description.eng: You can see the full tutorial at Profile > Tutorial tab
description.trans: Úplný návod na profiloch nájdete na karte Profille> Tab

noPlayerFound.trans: Žiadny hráč s menom „${search} nebol nájdený“

subTitle.eng: Congratulations, you have leveled up your ${levelName}!

description.eng: This will donate ${amount} Unit from your account
description.trans: Týmto sa daruje jednotka ${amount} z vášho účtu

notEnough.eng: You do not have enough Unit to donate.

description.eng: Please click reload to continue
description.trans: Kliknite na položku Reload a pokračujte

searchHint.eng: Search is case-insensitive but requires exact name match
searchHint.trans: Vyhľadávanie ignoruje veľké a malé písmená, ale vyžaduje presnú zhodu názvu

eventEnded.eng: The New Year event has ended!

noPass.eng: You need a Fireworks Pass to play! Find them in dungeon chests or from AFK farming.
noPass.trans: Potrebujete Fireworks Pass, aby ste mohli hrať! Nájdete ich v lochových truhliciach alebo pri AFK farmovaní.

message.eng: The game encountered an error. Don't worry - your Fireworks Pass was not consumed!
message.trans: Došlo k chybe hry. Neboj sa – Váš Fireworks Pass nebol spotrebovaný!

howToGet.eng: Find passes in dungeon chests or from AFK farming during the event!
howToGet.trans: Hľadajte passy v podzemných skrýtkach alebo pri AFK farmovaní počas eventu!

rule1.eng: • Tap fireworks before they fizzle out!
rule1.trans: Ťuknite po ohňostrojoch, kým sa zhasnú!

needMoreHits.eng: You needed more hits to pass this stage
needMoreHits.trans: Pre túto úroveň ste potrebovali viac zásahov

desc1.eng: Ring in the New Year with spectacular fireworks and exclusive rewards!
desc1.trans: Oslávte Nový Rok spektakulárnym ohňostrojem a exkluzívnymi odmenami!

specialGame.eng: Play the Fireworks Show mini-game for bonus rewards!
specialGame.trans: Zahrajte si mini‑hru Vysilanie ohňostroja a získajte bonusové odmeny!

desc.eng: Fireworks, rewards & exclusive chat frame!
desc.trans: Ohňostroj, odmeny a exkluzívny chatový rámček!

1.eng: Let us send you a notification when:
1.trans: Nechajte nás vám poslať upozornenie, keď:

2.eng: 1. When your AFK task is completed.
2.trans: 1. Keď je tvoja AFK úloha dokončená.

3.eng: 2. When you receive a free buff deployed by other player.
3.trans: 2. Keď dostaneš zadarmo buff od iného hráča.

4.trans: 3. Keď ťa hráč spomenul v chate.

5.eng: 3. When a player has mentioned you in chat.

content.eng: AFK task completed, receive your reward now✨
content.trans: AFK úloha dokončená, teraz si vyzdvihni svoju odmenu✨

content.trans: ${name} nasadil EXP buff pre všetkých, EXP +80% na 20 minút!

title.eng: You received a free EXP buff!

content.eng: ${name} used a global skip, that skips everyone's AFK task by 120 minutes
content.trans: ${name} použil globálny preskočenie, ktoré preskočí každého AFK úlohu o 120 minút

title.eng: Your AFK task has been skipped by ${name}
title.trans: Vaša AFK úloha bola preskočená používateľom ${name}

content.eng: Whats up? wanna join my gang?
content.trans: Čo sa deje? Chceš sa pridať k mojej bande?

content.eng: The item has been sent to your item inbox
content.trans: Položka bola odoslaná do vašej schránky na položky

canAccessError.eng: You need to be at least level 5 to access bank
canAccessError.trans: You need to be at least level 5 to access the bank

eng: Welcome. What can I store for you?
trans: Vitajte. Čo môžem pre vás uložiť?
Hello. This is the safest place for your most precious items.
Lucky you! Here your items are in the safest place.
Welcome. Do you have something to deposit?
Welcome to the Shangri-La branch. How can I help you today?
I lift things up and put them down. Kidding, but also, not really.
Bank of Arasaka for all your banking needs.
Welcome. What service are you using today?
24/7 for all your banking needs.
This is the most secure place in the city.
Hello there. My name is Lexi. What can I do for you?
Tellers to the left. Deposit stations to the right.
Thanks for visting today. Need any favors?
Not you again... What do you want?
I trust you're not planning any trouble. What can I do for you, friend?
Look over there. You'll see that Misaki offers the best interest loans, if that interests you.
Ever run into an adventuring nomad named Finel?
Our bank is the most secure in the world. Nevermind the only one...
Would you also like to open a savings account?
You need to deposit one White Legendary Special Weapon to open a savings account.
Alpha was just here asking about any epics in your locker!
There's a problem with your ID. Please pay 1 BTC.

eng: Hey, beautiful. Wanna swap those seashells for something refreshing? I've got just the fix
Look who just jacked in. Trade those seashells with me, and I'll give you something to remember.
Thirsty, choom? Trade those seashells for an ice-cold soda pop that'll knock your socks off!
trans: Hey, beautiful. Wanna swap those seashells for something refreshing? I’ve got just the fix
Look who just jacked in. Trade those seashells with me, and I’ll give you something to remember.
Thirsty, choom? Trade those seashells for an ice-cold soda pop that’ll knock your socks off!

eng: Life is tough, but you're tougher. Keep fighting.
Stay strong, stay punk, and stay alive.
Remember, your worth is not defined by your struggles.
Don't let the system bring you down, rise up and rebel.
Stay connected to your inner self, and disconnect from the noise.
Stay online, stay strong, and stay true to yourself.
trans: Život je ťažký, ale ty si silnejší. Bojuj ďalej.
Ostaň silný, ostaň punk a ostať nažive.
Pamätaj si, tvoja hodnota nie je definovaná tvojimi súbojmi.
Nenechajte, aby ho zničil, vstávajte a vzdorujte.
Udržiavajte kontakt so svojím vnútorným ja a odpojte sa od hluku.
Zostaň online, zostaň silný a zostaň verný sebe.

eng: Hey kid, wanna make some quick bucks?
trans: Hej, chlapec, chceš si zarobiť rýchlo?

tut.eng: You can sell excessive equipment caches here for higher price
tut.trans: Tu môžete predať nadbytočné vybavenie za vyššiu cenu

eng: Ho ho ho, choom! Ready to trade your loot for some holiday cheer?
My eyes are up here, little man.
Ho ho ho! The Animals want to rule the streets, but they'll never outlift me.
Ho ho hold up—do you even lift, little man?
Who needs chimney when you can just punch through the wall?
trans: Ho ho ho, choom! Chceš si vymeniť svoje zvyšky za novoročné veselie?
Moje oči sú tu hore, malý muž.
Ho ho ho! The Animals want to rule the streets, but they’ll never outlift me.
Ho ho, počkaj—ešte sa budete trénovať, malý chlap?
Kto potrebuje komín, keď sa dá prebodnúť cez stenu?

canAccessError.eng: You need to be at least level 3 to access cosmetic merchant
canAccessError.trans: You need to be at least level 5 to access the cosmetic merchant

eng: Hi! Donate to get cosmetic perks and to help support Free-to-Win games like this one!
trans: Ahoj! Donujte, aby ste získali kozmetické bonusy a podporili hry zadarmo na výhru, ako je táta!
Have you considered making a monthly donation?
Nice to see you, what is it you require?
Want to stand out from the crowd? Maybe grab a subscription.
I can apply a profile photo to your profile if you buy a subscription. What do you say?
Want a colorful border for online chatting? Why don't you subscribe?
The cost of the lowest subscription is only a cup of coffee. Think you could spare me some caffeine?
Donating makes you pretty and helps the development of the game.
Want to make a scene? Make yourself shine brighter than the sun with a new look!
I can't offer you any pay-to-win content, but I can definitely make you look dazzling!
Colorful is the new cool! I can give you a color... for a price.
You like pictures, I like pictures, we all like pictures. For a price, anyone can have one!
Donations keep the game development going. I buy coffee with it so I can keep on making content!
Coding is exhausting. A good coffee is only 2 dollars!
With a donation, you can help support the game and look cool doing it! Color, pictures, and animations!
Money makes the world go 'round! You donating means I can make this a full time job!
Fancy a cool profile, do ye?
You look like a person who knows their style! Tell you what, I'll give you style for a price.
Beauty tip #1: Color is half of what makes the world so amazing!

tut.eng: If you liked the game, please consider donation :)
tut.trans: If you like the game, please consider donating :)

canAccessError.eng: You need to be at least level 15 to access the Equipment Exchange
canAccessError.trans: Pre prístup k výmene vybavenia potrebuješ aspoň úroveň 15

eng: Got some epic gear collecting dust? I can turn that into something useful.
Three pieces of epic equipment you no longer need? one guaranteed shard. That's the deal.
Welcome to the fusion hub, where old gear becomes new possibilities.
One man's trash is another's treasure, choom. I can turn your unwanted gear into diamonds.
The fusion process is irreversible, but the rewards are worth it, most of the time at least.
trans: Máš nejakú epickú výbavu, ktorá ti leží? Mám ju premeniť na niečo užitočné.
Tri kusy epického vybavenia, ktoré už nepotrebujete? O jednom garantovanom kuse. To je dohoda.
Vitajte v fúznom uzle, kde sa staré vybavenie mení na nové možnosti.
Čo niekomu je odpad, tomu niekomu je poklad, kolega. Môžem tvoje nepotrebné vybavenie zmeniť na diamanty.
Proces zlúčenia je neodvratný, ale odmeny stoja za to, aspoň väčšinou.

tut.eng: Exchange 3 EPIC tier equipment for Epic Equipment Cache or fragments
tut.trans: Výmena 3 predmetov epic úrovne za Epic Equipment Cache alebo časti

canAccessError.eng: You need to be at least level 10 to access Calibration Station
canAccessError.trans: Na prístup k kalibračnej stanici musíte byť aspoň úrovňou 10

eng: Insert a Calibration Core into the machine, and I shall help you calibrate any of your equipment.
trans: Vložte kalibračné jadro do stroja a ja vám pomôžem kalibrovať vaše vybavenie.
I'll help you calibrate your equipment, but it ain't my problem if it's destroyed in the process.
My eyes are up here, bud—and so's my gun.
You feelin' lucky? Go ahead and give the machine a try.
All sales are final, all calibration is done at your own risk, and if you wanna take it up with a manager... you're lookin' at her.
Name's Kamiko. That beauty over there is Cali. She's a bit... temperamental.
Your gear's looking a little... well, it could be better. I can help you with that.
It'll take a little while for Cali over here to decrypt the core you brought.
Once you pop in the calibration core, it'll take... eh, 30 minutes or so. You can wait here, but I'd really prefer if you didn't.
No, we don't sell calibration cores here. I provide the machine, you provide the cores. That's how things work here.
Is there a chance that Cali will shred your gear? Sure. But is it worth the gamble? Definitely.
What'll you be powering up today?
Time to calibrate some gear!

eng: You think furniture is heavy? I install entire apartment rigs between sets at the gym.
Bring me your kits, choom. I'll have them assembled faster than you can say 'do you even lift?'
Looking preem today! Almost as good as this quantum learning pod I just installed with one hand.
These muscles aren't just for show, friend. Watch me carry your entire bedroom set up six flights of stairs.
Installation instructions? Never heard of them. I just flex and the furniture assembles itself.
Your apartment will look nova, almost as amazing as these chrome biceps. Almost.
Need help moving that couch? Please, I bench press cargo containers for fun.
I could dance circles around these assembly tasks. Want to see my moves?
Installation is like a dance, choom, and I'm the best dancer in town. Watch me work!
Some people need tools. I just need rhythm and these guns. *flexes while dancing*
They say I'm too distracted by dancing to work... but somehow everything gets installed perfectly!
trans: Myslíš, že je nábytok ťažký? Ja inštalujem celé bytové zariadenia medzi sériami v telocvični.
Prinesie mi svoje sady, kolega. Sestavím ich rýchlejšie, než by si zmenil tvar
Dnes vyznám skvele! Takmer tak dobrý ako tá kvantová kapsula na učenie, ktorú som práve nainštaloval jednou rukou.
Tieto svaly nie sú len na okázanie, kamarát. Uvidíte, ako prenesiem celý váš izbový nábytok pošesnosestre na siedmich poschodí.
Inštrukcie na inštaláciu? Neznám to. Len sa krátím a nábytok sa sám sestaví.
Tvoje byty budú vyzerať nové, takmer ako tieto chromové bicepsy. Takmer.
Potrebuješ pomôcť s tým gaučom? Prosím, ja si zdvihám nákladné kontajnery pre zábavu.
Môžem sa týchto úloh zblázniť. Chcete vidieť, ako to robím?
Inštalácia je ako tanec, kámo, a ja som najlepší tanečník v meste. Pozrite sa, ako to robím!
Niektorí ľudia potrebujú nástroje. Ja potrebujem len rytmus a tieto zbrane. *napína svaly pri tanci*
Hovoria, že som príliš rozptyľovaný tancom, aby som sa dokázal venovať práci... ale nejak sa všetko inštaluje dokonalé!

eng: Pumpkin is my source of power!
Check out my pumpkin costume!
Hmmmm, I wonder what's inside this pumpkin...
Want a lollipop?
Give me your seeds, and I will give you a treat!
trans: Tekvica je môj zdroj sily!
Pozrite si moj tekvicový kostým!
Hmmmm, čo by sa dalo nájsť v tej tekvice...
Give me your pumpkin, and I'll give you a treat!
Daj mi svoje semienka a ja ti dám odmenu

eng: Welcome, our family is always excited to help you find the perfect tech gear.
trans: Vitajte, v našej rodine sme vždy radi vám pomôžu nájsť dokonalé tech vybavenie.

eng: Ready to light up the night? The countdown's about to begin!
Perfect timing is everything in fireworks, choom.
I've got the best pyrotechnics this side of Night City!
Wanna see some real fireworks? Show me what you've got!
The New Year's celebration won't wait forever, let's go!
trans: Sme pripravení osvietiť noc? Odpočet sa blíži!
Presný čas je pri ohňostrojoch všetko, kámoš.
Mám tu najlepšie pyrotechniky v tejto časti Night City!
Chceš vidieť skutočné ohňostroje? Ukaž mi, čo máš!
Novoročné oslavy sa neodkladajú, pojďme!

canAccessError.eng: You need to be at least level 10 to access partyline pub
canAccessError.trans: Musíš mať aspoň úroveň 10, aby si sa dostal do Partyline Pub-u

eng: Hey choom, ready to chip in for the next 24-hour global party? We're just a few units short!
Ready to make an impact? Your contribution could launch the biggest party on the grid!
Looking to start the party? We're pooling funds now for a round-the-clock celebration.
If you're aiming to see the city light up, help us fill the party meter. Every bit counts!
Hey, choomba! Here to plan another blockbuster event? Let's dive in!
trans: Ahoj kolega, pripravený pridať na ďalšiu globálnu 24hodinovú párty? Chýba nám len pár jednotiek!
Máš to v sebe? S tvojou pomocou môžeme vytvoriť najväčšiu partiu na sieti!
Chceš začať párty? Sme teraz v kolektíve na celodennú oslavu.
If you’re aiming to see the city light up, help us fill the party meter. Every bit counts!
Čau, kámoš! Tu na plánovanie ďalšieho veľkolepého projektu? Pustíme sa do toho!

eng: Hey, choom! Neon Paws is for the brave. These sprites need your daily grind. Ready to dive in?
Lookin' sharp, netrunner! Here, pets are more than code, they need your daily hack to thrive.
What's up, street samurai? Partner with a survivor. Without your daily deeds, they're zeroed.
Edge runner, eh? This is where tech meets heart. Ignore them, and they vanish into the net. Daily care, got it?
Cyberdeck in hand, heart on sleeve? Our critters need that daily touch or they'll fade into the static.
trans: Ahoj, kámo! Neon Paws je pre odvážnych. Tieto sprity potrebujú tvoju dennú prácu. Chceš sa ponoriť?
Výborný vzhľad, netrunner! Tu sú zvieratá viac ako kód, potrebujú vaše každodenné hacknutie, aby prežili.
Čo sa deje, uličný samuraj? Spriatel sa s preživším. Bez tvojich každodenných činov sú nulované.
Kibernetický bežec, hej? Tu sa stretáva technika so srdcom. Ignoruj ich a zmiznú v sieti. Denná údržba, chápeš?
Cyberdeck v rukách, srdce na viditeľnom mieste? Našim zvieratám potrebujete každodenný kontakt, inak zmiznú v šume.

eng: I'll print whatever you want if you have the cache!
trans: Vytlačím ti všetko, čo chceš, ak máš cache
Show me the cache and I will show you the result!
Please, tell me you have some Epic cache with you.
Welcome. I hope you are a customer...
If you got cache, I can print 'em!
So glad we no longer use ink; I can wear my best clothes to work.
Wonder why we never use our replicators to print food.
Tea, Earl Grey, hot. Maybe even bubble tea. 😋
Lemme see that cache of yours.
Live long and prosper. 🖖
I get excited every time I see a customer; maybe they have an Epic!
I feel lonely at times. One day I'll buy a love bot or android to keep me company.
Computers make excellent and efficient servants, but I have no wish to serve under them.
Don't worry, we won't run out of ink.
Sometimes I wonder what the outside world looks like. Will you tell me about it when you become famous?
Just keep printing, just keep printing.
I'm stuck here, but you're not. Win the war for me with your new gear!
I'll take your cache; you'll take the gear!
That new gear looks nice on you!
I wish someone would print me some legs! I'd love to see what's outside of this room...
I can print guns, yet I can't print myself a set of arms to greet you. Funny how that works...
If you fancy yourself a new getup then bring me the cache. I'll make your dreams come true.
I keep wondering who gets knocked out for you all to have so much cache.
I only make cheesy puns because no one will print me some legs so I can find something better to do.
I'm just a printer, but what I can make will help you get more cache.
I heard that Bank of Arasaka is a good place to store caches if you can't afford to print them yet.
The more gear I print, the more data I have. I get better at printing every day!
Can you print me a coffee? All this printing is exhausting.
Which one do you choose: Laser or Inkjet?
You're not here to print lewd images again, are you?
Print a duck
Please tell me you have some White Epic cache with you.
Just ran outta color ink. Hope ya like grayscale!
Why haven't I printed a copy of myself yet?
Sorry buddy, no free prints!
Good thing I can't print Bitcoin.
D-Don't print something stupid again, p-please.
It took me an extra microsecond to boot today.
Printing makes me happy!
🎵 I'm just a lonely printer~ 🎶 No one will print me a friend~ 🎵
Please stop trying to print pizzas.  The sauce clogs the machine nozzles.

canAccessError.eng: You need to be at least level 10 to access merchant
canAccessError.trans: Na prístup k obchodníkovi musíte byť aspoň úroveň 10

eng: Hey kid, I'm Lee, You know, you don't have to carry everything you own in your pockets.
trans: I can get you anything you could think of.
Let's make a trade.
You want it, I got it.
So, whaddaya say? Up for a little exchange?
Isn't it time you traded up?
Your money's only so good here. Let's see what else you got.
Welcome to my humble swap shop.
Let's have a look at what you brought in.
This ain't your average shop.
What've you got for me?
Pouches and packs for both fannies and backs!
I'm looking for quantity over quality.
Well? You got trades or not?
Isn't every bag a bag of holding?
Looks like you could use some more space to store stuff.
Name's Lee. As in 'exact-lee' who you needed to see.
Aren't you tired of lugging all your stuff around like that?
Seems like someone needs a new backpack.
If you love it, bag it!
Your pockets seem full. I could help you lighten that load.
How can you fight when your arms are so full of stuff?
You know, you don't have to carry everything you own in your pockets.
Here's the deal: You gimme your old bags, I give you a new bag.
The way you're walking makes me think you're overencumbered.
I'm who you talk to when you wanna secure the bag. Or the backpack.

description.eng: A family run trading shop that lets you trade with what they have found while scavenging
description.trans: A family-run trading shop that lets you trade with scavenged goods.

eng: Hey kid... Come check out my goods.
trans: Hej, chlapček, pozrite si to, čo tu mám.
Hurting? You've come to the right place.
We've got the cheap stuff and the good stuff, kid.
Have you heard about the street angel?
Welcome to Trinoky Mart. You can call me Doc.
We are open 24/7. Unless we aren't.
Don't cause any trouble and don't bring any trouble.
Try to steal anything and I will have a new mannequin.
The least you could do is stop bleeding before you come in.
No refunds and no exchanges. I don't run a charity here.
Hey kid. How are you today?
Don't stop at Grade 7, or else you'll be slaving away here forever like me.
The finest medical supply mart in all of Shangri-La.
SLPD causing a racket again. I hope the council puts them in their place.
Hey kid, ever heard of The 3Helix Network?
Hey kid, ever run into anyone called the Worldslayer?
Did you hear about the restaurant on the moon? Great food but no atmosphere!
A cheese factory exploded in France. There was da brie everywhere!
Geology rocks but Geography is where it’s at!
I hate how funerals are always at 9 a.m. I’m not really a mourning person.
Why did Adele cross the road? To say hello from the other side.
I don’t trust stairs. They’re always up to something.
What did the sushi say to the bee? Wasabee!
The past, the present, and the future walk into a bar. It was tense!
Why should you never trust a train? They have loco motives.
I was wondering why the ball was getting bigger. Then it hit me.
I used to work in a shoe-recycling shop. It was sole destroying!
Come to Quark's! Quark's is fun! Come right now – and don't walk – run!
I've got the best gear you'll find anywhere!
I used to collect colored Legendary Special Weapon, but now everything's just white
The changing rooms are over there…
Let's close the deal before I wet myself!
Please take a look! We surely have something that tickles your fancy...

eng: I'll help you to progress to the next area!

My daughter's name is not Mithra! Stop making fun of her!
Are you prepared?
The key is nothing without the container.
Which weighs more, traveller? Your guns, or your past?
The key above all things... except a good drink.
One key, one purpose.

eng: Do you want to buy Units, or use your Units?
We also have Eternal Bond Rings for those looking to unite with their partner forever.
trans: Chceš kúpiť Jednotky, alebo ich použiť?
Thanks for checking the store out.
Did you know that the S.A.T. was in a developmental phase for a long time?
We just got a new stock of S.A.T.'s. Interested in getting one?
Welcome to the Arasaka Unit Exchange.
Did you know the current S.A.T.'s are actually version 2.0?
Remember: Rare S.A.T.'s and Normal grade S.A.T.'s arent compatible.
BTC? No, we only deal in UNITs here.
Do you know Lexi from the bank? We went to school together.
Have you visited Doc at Trinoky Mart? You don't look too well.
Most folks around here are nice. I stress most.
Been anywhere interesting lately? I just got back from Neo-Japan.
There's nothing like a hot cup of tea on a cold day, won't you agree?
We got more S.A.T.'s on the way. Want to take a look in the mean time?
Global S.A.T.'s signals tend to go up at random. Be sure to pay attention.
My radio jammed up pretty bad the other day. Turns out it was the 3Helix Network.
You want to really make everyone's day? Buy some units and use 'em for EXP boosts!
Buying units and spending them benefits everyone, you know?
A game that isn't pay to win. Fancy that!
Everyone gets something out of your purchase, even the dev!
Noise complaint?

tut.eng: You can purchase global buff items here

eng: You will find the best gear here, trust me.
trans: Tu nájdeš najlepšie vybavenie, ver mi.
I can help you if you give me some BitCoin.
I can repair your equipment... for a price.
What do you want, stranger?
Check out what I have scavenged today.
Won't find anything better around these parts.
Have a look at what I've got today.
Fresh wares plundered from the wasteland.
What can I get you today?
Buy something already. I haven't got all day.
You break it, you buy it. Global policy.
Interested in anything we got today?
Welcome to my shop. Have a look around.
Can I help you find something, stranger?
Quality weapons only at this Smithy.
Care to buy one to protect yourself?
The finest weapon smith in Shangri-La at your service.
It's dangerous to go alone.... nevermind.
I was an adventurer like you. Until I established this shop.
No returns or exchanges. What you pay is what you get.
Haven't had enough of me yet, have ya?
The finest weapons and armor.
Hmm... guns, helmets, etc. Pretty much anything to suit your needs.
Looking to protect yourself or deal some damage?
Oh? A bit of this and a bit of that.
Trinkets, odds-and-ends. You know... That sort of thing.
Some may call this junk. Me? I call it treasure.
Have you ever met the Worldslayer?
Tell the President I said hi!
I wonder what Lucille's up to...
Don't just window-shop. Buy something!
Anything in particular that you're looking for?
You look like you know a bargain when you see one!
I used to be an adventurer like you, but then I took a bullet to the knee
LEDs, ropes, explosives. You want it? It's yours, my friend. As long as you have enough Bitcoin.
I always collect the finest blasters I can.
Nice weapon you've got there. Compensating for something?
I once saw someone kill three men in a bar... with a pencil.
Welcome, Baba Yaga.
The Boogeyman?!

des1.eng: Hi! I'm Dexter, the developer of this game, and I hope to know your experience so far.
des1.trans: Ahoj! Som Dexter, vývojár tejto hry, a chcel by som vedieť, aké máš zatiaľ skúsenosti.

des2.eng: Receive the following rewards for completing the survey:
des2.trans: Získaj tieto odmeny za dokončenie prieskumu:

disclaim.eng: You will receive the rewards regardless of your answer
disclaim.trans: Odmeny dostaneš bez ohľadu na tvoju odpoveď

feedbackTitle.eng: Sorry to hear that, please let me know what I can improve:
feedbackTitle.trans: Prepáč, že to počujem, daj mi vedieť, čo môžem zlepšiť:

question1.eng: Do you like free to win games?
question1.trans: Máš rád hry, kde môžeš vyhrať zadarmo?

question2.eng: How do you feel about our global buff and global skip system?
question2.trans: Ako sa cítiš ohľadom nášho globálneho posilnenia a globálneho preskočenia systému?

question3.eng: How many stars would you rate my game?
question3.trans: Koľko hviezdičiek by si hre dal?

quote.eng: I went in with low expectations, thinking it would just be another game for ads. But it's actually a really high quality game, great for killing time and talking to people. The community I've met so far has been so kind and welcoming!
quote.trans: Pri vstupe som sa do toho pustil so nízkymi očakávaniami – predpokladal som, že to bude len ďalšia hra na reklamy. No je to vlastne výborná a vysoko kvalitná hra, ktorá je skvelá na zabíjanie času a rozhovory s ostatnými. Komunita, ktorú som stretol až do tejto chvíle, bola tak priateľská a vítajúca!

quote.eng: The game is fun. I love how engaging the community is, especially when it comes to the global skips and buffs. Simple but not too demanding.
quote.trans: Hra je zábavná. Milujem, aká zapojivá je komunita, hlavne keď ide o globálne preskakovanie a buffy. Jednoduchá, ale zároveň ne príliš náročná.

quote.eng: I love that the buffs benefit everyone playing the game. It's a new vibe to me - I'm used to using buffs for myself! Highly recommended for playing in your leisure time.
quote.trans: Mám rád, že buffy prospievajú všetkým hráčom. Pre mňa je to úplne nový vibe – zvyknutý som používať buffy pre seba! Vysoko odporúčam hranie počas voľného času.

quote.eng: Everything is S tier in this game - the system, the community, and the developer. Everyone is generous. When I started, a high-leveled player literally gifted me 1000 painkillers and 5000 ammo.
quote.trans: Všetko je na S‑tier v tejto hre – systém, komunita aj vývojár. Všichni sú priateľskí. Keď som začínal, jeden hráč na vysokom leveli mi doslova daroval 1000 liekov proti bolesti a 5000 amunicí.

quote.eng: Definitely hooked! Especially how it has the cyberpunk vibe. I'm a big fan of the game already, makes this a hit for me.
quote.trans: Určite som na to závislý! Najmä preto, že má cyberpunkový vibe. Už som veľkým fanúšikom tejto hry, takže pre mňa je to hit.

quote.eng: Great for chill cyberpunk fans. Not for players who want fast action or flashy graphics.
quote.trans: Výborne sa hodí pre fanúšikov relaxačného cyberpunka. Nie je určené pre hráčov, ktorí túžia po rýchlej akcii alebo pestrej grafike.

quote.eng: A text-based game about exploring and surviving in a cyberpunk world. I love it. There are enemies you fight that are tied to references old and new.
quote.trans: Textová hra o skúmaní a prežívaniu v kyberpunkovom svete. Milujem ju. Nepriatelia, ktorých bojujete, sú viazaní na referencie z minulosti aj budúcnosti.

quote.eng: Very good experience. I suggest it to everyone. If you're finding something you can play anytime, this is it.
quote.trans: Veľmi dobrý zážitok. Odporúčam ho všetkým. Ak hľadáte niečo, čo si môžete zahrať kedykoľvek, toto je to.

quote.eng: Lots of fun, plenty to do, both actively and AFK. Best of all is no in-app purchases! Very much NOT pay to win.
quote.trans: Mnoho zábavy, veľa čo robiť – aj aktívne a AFK. Najlepšie je, že nie sú žiadne nákupy v aplikácii! Skutočne NIE pay-to-win.

quote.eng: I really love this app - the gameplay, the minimalist but engaging quests, especially the community! The players are really helpful and kind enough to give me gifts.
quote.trans: Skutočne milujem túto aplikáciu – herná skúsenosť, minimalistické, ale pútavé úlohy a hlavne komunita! Hráči sú naozaj milí a ochotní mi dávať dary.

desc1.eng: During event period, Roasted Turkey will drop rarely from scavenging and AKF Bot on all levels
desc1.trans: Počas obdobia podujatia sa pečené morčacie mäso zriedka spadnú z upratovania a robota AKF na všetkých úrovniach

desc2.eng: When a Roasted Turkey is consumed, you will get +20% EXP on AFK tasks for 20 minutes
desc2.trans: Keď sa konzumuje pečená morka, získate +20% exp na úlohy AFK po dobu 20 minút

footnote1.eng: Please note that the EXP bonus check is at AFK completion time, so you must have the Roasted Turkey buff active at the time of completion to receive the bonus.
footnote1.trans: Vezmite prosím na vedomie, že kontrola bonusu EXP je v čase dokončenia AFK, takže na prijatie bonusu musíte mať pražený morčací buff aktívny.

footnote2.eng: This effect will stack with other EXP bonus, and will only affect AFK tasks; tasks that does not have AFK timers will not be affected.
footnote2.trans: Tento efekt sa bude skladať s ďalším bonusom EXP a ovplyvní iba úlohy AFK; Úlohy, ktoré nemajú časovače AFK, nebudú ovplyvnené.
